title: The War on Poverty's Experiment in Public Medicine: Community Health Centers and the Mortality of Older Americans
notes: Bailey & Goodman-Bacon (2015). AER. Outcome: amr_eld = age-adjusted mortality rate (50+, per 100k), weight=popwt_eld. Protocol rule (i): paper title='Mortality of Older Americans', abstract emphasizes 50+ result, Figure 7D is the key event study. Staggered rollout of Community Health Centers 1965-1974 (early CHCs only; late CHCs 1975-1980 treated as never-treated). 114 treated counties, 2948 control counties. ~91k obs, 3062 counties, 1959-1988. Stata: xtreg amr_eld _Iyear* _IyeaXDu* _IyeaXst* D_* R_* H_* _DD* [aw=popwt_eld], cluster(fips) fe. Table 2 Panel B Col 2 / Figure 7D. FEs: county + year + urban-categoryĂ—year (Durb = 5 bins of 1960 urban share). Cols 3/6 add stateĂ—year (not in baseline). D_ = baselineĂ—trend (Pattern 37), R_/H_ = time-varying. 10 cohorts (1965-1974). SA applicable. Drops NYC/LA/Chicago. CS-NT DIAGNOSTICS (Pattern 51): Baseline CS-NT (xformla=~1) showed +40-50 pre-trend bias vs TWFEâ‰ˆ0. Root cause: identification relies on DurbĂ—year + stateĂ—year FEs that CS-NT can't absorb. Tested: (1) xformla=~Durb_f (5 urban categories) â†’ pre-trends reduced ~80% to +10-15, ATT=-59 (SE=20); (2) + state dummies â†’ overshoot to negative pre-trends (Pattern 42 overfitting). Fix: cs_controls=[Durb_f]. 5 urban dummies capture most of the confounding without propensity overfitting. Remaining gap vs TWFE due to stateĂ—year + baselineĂ—trend controls that only regression-based estimators absorb. | AUDIT 2026-04-19: Paper-auditor NOT_APPLICABLE (legitimate â€” paper reports bucketed event-year groups, no static ATT). Headline CS representation = Spec C (cs_controls=[Durb_f], 1 urban dummy): CS-NT=-58.99 dynamic / -61.43 simple, consistent with TWFE=-53 direction, magnitude +11-16%. Spec A experiment (CS with all 9 twfe_controls = urbanĂ—year + stateĂ—year etc): collapses to -6.78 / +7.46 (15th near-collapse instance, pattern = CS-DID can't absorb paper's urbanĂ—year + stateĂ—year FE structure through xformla â€” Durb_f alone is the optimal proxy).
